title: GamertagName's Offcial SMP Pack
description: This is a modpack for my personal SMP. I hope you use it for yourself
body: Have you ever wanted to have endless combat in Minecraft? Well, now you can. This modpack, which is used on my own personal server adds many many things to the base game of Minecraft. It sports mods such as Immersive Airships for easier exploration, Regions Unexplored for an ever-growing world, and Advent of Ascension for endless fun with a variety of weapons. You could also become a powerful mage if that is what you desire. Build up your world and take on the endless waves of mobs that threaten your way of life. These are not the only mods that are added, there are many more that will give you countless hours of fun. This pack supports many other mods to give you endless hours of fun, whether that be on your own or used in your own server. It is recommended to put a little bit more RAM into the pack to ensure it runs smoothly. I hope you enjoy this pack as much as I do. I am hoping to keep it up to date and keep it fresh with new mods every so often.
